name: fourteen enforced detector rules span the cloud and governance namespaces
command: [ "$(grep -hE '^- id: g-' $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/aws/*-iac-enforcement.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/azure/*-iac-enforcement.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/gcp/*-iac-enforcement.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/hashicorp/*-iac-enforcement.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/linux-foundation/*-iac-enforcement.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/security-governance/*-iac-enforcement.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/*-iac-enforcement.yaml | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" -eq 14 ] && echo fourteen-rules 1>&2
